infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Thalos uses your local network to connect to the Metro development server.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Thalos uses the camera to scan QR codes for buddy collaboration and to capture dive photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Thalos accesses your photos to attach them to dives and share with dive buddies.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Thalos saves dive photos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Thalos uses your location to auto-generate the Emergency Action Plan with nearby hospitals, hyperbaric chambers, and local emergency contacts for your dive site.

plugins.cameraPermission: Thalos uses the camera to scan QR codes for buddy collaboration.

plugins.photosPermission: Thalos accesses your photos to attach them to dives and share with dive buddies.
plugins.cameraPermission: Thalos uses the camera to capture dive photos and videos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Thalos uses your location to auto-generate the Emergency Action Plan with nearby hospitals and local emergency contacts for your dive site.
